title: Simple Teleport Commands
description: Provides fast, reliable teleportation for SMPs and small servers, with no extra setup required.
body:
**Simple Teleport Commands - Lightweight and Accessible Teleportation**

Simple Teleport Commands is a lightweight and easy-to-use mod that adds essential teleport features without requiring players to have operator (OP) permissions.

Commands:

- /tpto <player>: Instantly teleport to another player
  
- /tphere <player>: Bring another player directly to you

Designed for SMPs, small servers, and private worlds, this mod makes teleportation accessible to everyone, not just admins. No complicated setup and no unnecessary features. Just fast and reliable teleportation that works out of the box.
